issuesFixed.fix: Removed `dark bg-transparent!` from section class and removed all `before:*` pseudo-element classes from the container div in both FeaturedEvents.php (line 90-91) and FeaturedEvents.tsx (lines 137, 140). Container is now a clean `container py-16`.

issuesFixed.description: Date badge repositioned inside inner image frame.
issuesFixed.fix: Moved date badge from being `absolute top-4 right-4` on the outer container to `absolute top-2 right-2` inside the inner frame (which now has `relative p-2`). The badge now sits within the inner rounded frame with proper 8px clearance from the frame edges.

issuesFixed.description: Card halves now use bg-dark-pattern instead of bg-charcoal.
issuesFixed.fix: Replaced `bg-charcoal` with `bg-dark-pattern` on both the image half and content half divs in card-tribe_events.php. Removed `overflow-hidden` from the outer image container (now only on the inner frame) to let the dark-pattern show around the image. Added `rounded-lg` to the image itself.

issuesFixed.description: Arrow icon added to btn-tertiary CTA.
issuesFixed.fix: Added `` after the button label text, matching the pattern used by card-policy.php, card-resource.php, and card-post.php. Also added `dark:hover:text-white dark:focus:text-white` to preserve white text on hover in the dark-pattern context.

issuesFixed.description: Font sizes corrected for day number and event title.
issuesFixed.fix: Day number: changed from `text-header-5` (24px/2xl) to `font-heading text-[2.5rem]` (40px, matching Figma font/size/3xl). Event title: changed from `text-header-4` (24px/2xl) to `text-header-2` (48px mobile, matching Figma font/size/4xl). Both retain Anton font via font-heading. Note: theme's text-header-5 and text-header-4 both resolve to 24px, neither matches the 40px/48px Figma spec — using text-header-2 for title (48px literal mobile value) and custom text-[2.5rem] for day.

issuesFixed.description: Venue data seeded and associated with test events.
issuesFixed.fix: Created 3 tribe_venue posts via /tribe/events/v1/venues: Vancouver Convention Centre (ID 245), Rogers Arena (ID 246), BC Place Stadium (ID 247). Associated via _EventVenueID meta: events 235+236 → 245, events 237+238 → 246, event 239 → 247. Venue names now render in all event cards as confirmed by page audit.

validationResults.notes: All 8 lint warnings are pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps issues in Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, and Tabs — none in FeaturedEvents. The sync warning (root wrapper mismatch InspectorControls vs section) is expected for this block pattern where TSX root is editor controls only.

pageAuditResults.notes: Section index 2 ('Don't Miss These Events') renders 0 cards — expected, it uses a manual or filtered selection that has no matching events. All other 6 instances show correct event data including venue names.
